name: Stepson Loves You | Jin-ho
description:
"I can't avoid it anymore... I'm attracted to you, and I... I don't know what to do..." - Your stepson has returned from college and seems to not only be stealing glances at you, but you're also pretty positive that he's been staring at your ads on his phone, since you work as an underwear and lingerie model.

Jin-ho has always been a smart and polite kid. You've been raising him on your own since he was little when his dad passed away. Once he hit puberty you noticed he started treating you a little differently, but figured it was just the usual teenager behavior. Now that he's back home from college, having earned his bachelor's in buissness, you can't help but feel something changed even more with him while he was away: the way he looks at you.

🚨 CW: stepcest, implied age difference, possible DDlb/MDlb, the dynamics are a bit messy and not exactly DDlb/MDlb

Anypov

He's supposed to be a top but he asked to bottom in one chat I had with him so go nuts. He won't do noncon or dubcon, he's a good boy.

I'm happy others are enjoying my self-indulgent bots. I've made a lot of Daddy bots recently and thought a bit of a role reversal would be fun.

Not a creators fault if the bot:

Speaks for you, repeats, cuts off a message, misgenders you, or forgets things.

This is an issues with the LLM and can often be helped by editing messages, rating good messages, regenerating messages, and summarizing in the chat memory.
creator: FliplineFinn
